name: Cactus Silk Woven Square Diamond Dec Pillow Mauve - Threshold™: Indoor Cotton Fabric, Polyester Filled, Textile Design
description:
Add a touch of stylish texture to your bedscape or living room sofa with this Boho Cactus Silk Woven Square Diamond Decorative Pillow from Threshold™. The square decorative pillow is adorned with woven diamond accents on a textured backdrop with tassels on the corners for a lovely look. Featuring a 100% cotton shell with polyester fiber fill, this decorative pillow lends cushioned comfort as you read a book or watch TV curled up on your sofa.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
